cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the Test Engineer role at RateS. I saw you are looking for someone to maintain testing frameworks and improve efficiency. My experience in both software development and process automation fits this need perfectly.

I currently develop core features in C++ and JavaScript at EXAIL Robotics. I also redesigned our installation process. It used to take about 2 days. Now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time. I can apply this same focus on reliability and speed to your QA metrics.

On my own time, I built ValoFenua, a full-stack React app with Supabase. It uses a daily scraper and an AI pipeline to process 1,300+ listings. This project required strict testing of data flows to ensure accurate price estimations. I'm used to handling complex systems and debugging defects in fast-paced environments.

I'm finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering (2026). I'd like to help RateS ensure its retail platform remains reliable as you scale.

Aodren Gloux

commentaire: Une excellente opportunité junior qui valorise l'automatisation de données et le développement Python, ce qui résonne avec les projets de scraping et d'IA d'Aodren.
